init_hook: # --- 0. NO auto-update: solo asegurar que .devtools exista (sin mover commits) ---
# --- 0.1 Aviso de versión (NO muta, solo informa) ---
DT_LATEST_TAG=""; if [[ -n "$DT_URL" ]]; then DT_LATEST_TAG="$(git ls-remote --tags --refs "$DT_URL" 'refs/tags/v*' 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '{print $3}' | sort -V | tail -n1)"; fi;
echo "⚠️  Devtools desactualizado: último tag remoto $DT_LATEST_TAG (tú: $DT_LOCAL_TAG).";
echo '🔍 Blindando entorno: Activando herramientas corporativas en memoria...'
# Resolver rutas candidatas robustas (root, symlinks y anidado)
for d in "$root/.devtools" "$root/.devtools/bin" "$root/.devtools/.devtools" "$root/.devtools/.devtools/bin" "$root/bin" "$root"; do [[ -e "$d" ]] && candidates+=("$d"); done
# Fallback por PATH para no depender 100% de aliases efimeros
for tool in acp gp rp promote feature pr lim devtools-update devtools-evidence-e2e; do
# 1. LIMPIEZA: Borramos cualquier rastro permanente anterior en .git/config
# 2. Búsqueda del script OFICIAL de la empresa (sigue symlinks)

printf -v "GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_$idx" '%s' "!f(){ r=\"\$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)\"; for c in \"\$r/.devtools/bin/git-$tool.sh\" \"\$r/.devtools/bin/git-$tool\" \"\$r/bin/git-$tool.sh\" \"\$r/bin/git-$tool\" \"\$r/.devtools/.devtools/bin/git-$tool.sh\" \"\$r/.devtools/.devtools/bin/git-$tool\" \"$REPO_SCRIPT\"; do [[ -f \"\$c\" ]] && exec bash \"\$c\" \"\$@\"; done; echo \"bash: git-$tool script no encontrado\" >&2; return 127; }; f"
# 4. Aplicar los cambios en memoria a Git
echo "🔒 Git Config: $idx herramientas corporativas cargadas (desaparecerán al salir)."
# Detectar marker de completado en el root correcto
# Ejecutar wizard (si falla verify, NO rompemos shell init gracias a || true)
for d in "${candidates[@]}"; do echo "     - $d"; done;
echo '✅ Database credentials & SSL settings applied automatically.'
echo '💡 Try running: devbox run backend'

if [[ -t 0 && -t 1 ]]; then DEVX_CHOICE=""; if command -v gum >/dev/null 2>&1; then DEVX_CHOICE="$(gum choose --header "Selecciona tu Rol:" "Admin" "Dev" "Ops")"; else echo "Selecciona tu Rol:"; select opt in "Admin" "Dev" "Ops"; do DEVX_CHOICE="$opt"; break; done; fi; case "$DEVX_CHOICE" in "Admin") export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="IHH" ;; "Dev") export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="PMBOK" ;; "Ops") export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="GITOPS" ;; *) export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="${DEVBOX_ENV_NAME:-DEVBOX}" ;; esac; devx() { export DEVBOX_ENV_NAME="$1"; }; fi

if command -v starship >/dev/null 2>&1; then top="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; sp="$(git rev-parse --show-superproject-working-tree 2>/dev/null || true)"; root="${top:-${sp:-$(pwd)}}"; export STARSHIP_CONFIG="$root/.starship.toml"; if [[ -n "${ZSH_VERSION:-}" ]]; then eval "$(starship init zsh)"; else eval "$(starship init bash)"; fi; else if [[ -n "${ZSH_VERSION:-}" ]]; then export PROMPT="(devbox ${DEVBOX_ENV_NAME}) ${PROMPT}"; else export PS1="(devbox ${DEVBOX_ENV_NAME}) ${PS1}"; fi; fi

scripts.backend: cd apps/pmbok/backend && chmod +x entrypoint.sh && poetry run ./entrypoint.sh python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.dev:bootstrap: SKIP_CONNECT=1 task cluster:up && git promote local && task cluster:connect
